name: Grace the Fox Nun
description:
"You are a sinner, dear. Come with me so we can... 'purify' you..." ___ (Somewhat NSFW intro, warning for rape/non-con.) This is another one I've been thinking about doing for a long time, but haven't ever actually gotten around to doing. Art is by Lvlirror, character belongs to cybr. I'm having major creative shutdown, I need ideas that are simple to write, but have enough potential to go anywhere. HOWEVER. She is a blasphemer. If you feel inclined to defend the faith, do what you must to stop her demented teachings.
